---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */

body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1050px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
  transition:0.2s ease;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:80px 60px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3.2rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:720px;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:30px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}

.card-box h2{
  font-size:1.12rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:16px;
}

.card-box p{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.8;
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== CODE BLOCK ===== */

.cell{
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:10px;
  background:#fbfcfb;
}

.code-fold-button{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border:none !important;
  border-radius:10px !important;
  color:white !important;
  font-size:0.9rem !important;
}

/* ===== TOC ===== */

.sidebar nav[role=doc-toc] ul > li > a{
  color:#374151;
  font-size:0.92rem;
}

.sidebar nav[role=doc-toc] ul > li > a:hover{
  color:#163a2d;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  margin-top:34px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:12px;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
  font-weight:600;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

Assignment 2

Simple R Computation

This assignment demonstrates a basic R operation as part of the EMU430 Data Analytics course.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Objective

The purpose of this assignment is to practice basic R syntax and ensure proper Quarto rendering.

:::

::: {.card-box}

R Code
1 + 1

:::

::: {.card-box}

Result Interpretation

The expression 1 + 1 evaluates to 2, demonstrating a simple arithmetic operation in R.

I am currently waiting for the second assignment content to continue developing this section.

:::

<div class="footer">

Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>

</div> ```
